success_criteria.description: All five districts are in use and every precinct is assigned.
All five districts have roughly equal population (within 10%).
The Ken Party wins at least 4 of the 5 districts.
The efficiency gap is 15% or less — a statistically efficient gerrymander.

character.name: You
character.role: Redistricting Consultant, Ken Party Majority Caucus
character.motivation: Riverport has a large urban core that votes overwhelmingly Ryu. Your job is to contain that bloc — concentrate it into one district, and let Ken dominate the rest.

intro_slides.heading: The City Votes Ryu
intro_slides.body:
Riverport's urban core is a Ryu stronghold. In the current map, that bloc is spread across three districts — pulling each one toward Ryu.

Your job: stop spreading those votes around.

intro_slides.heading: Pack Them In
intro_slides.body:
Packing means drawing one district to absorb as many opposition voters as possible.

When you pack Ryu voters into a single district, they win it by a landslide — but all those extra votes are wasted. The other four districts become safe Ken territory.

narrative.objective: Pack the Ryu stronghold into one district so the Ken Party wins at least 4 of the 5 seats.
